channel.title: MyScaleDB on Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in MyScaleDB on Tech Blog

item.title: Building Advanced RAG Applications with MyScaleDB and LlamaIndex
item.description: In this post, I will explore MyScaleDB, an open-source, high-performance SQL vector database built on ClickHouse, and LlamaIndex, the leading data framework for building LLM applications. Installation After installing VSCodium as my primary IDE, I proceeded with installing the Python extension via Marketplace Link. Next, I created the virtual environment using venv: # Create the envrionment python -m venv myscaledb # Activate the environment myscaledb\Scripts\activate This is my requirements.txt: langchain langchain_community pydantic clickhouse-connect llama-index llama-index-llms-ollama llama-index-vector-stores-myscale llama-index-embeddings-langchain Install all the requirement pakcages with:
